meta.description: Comprehensive research on aircraft engine maintenance, overhaul, shop visit patterns, and aftermarket economics. Engine parts represent the highest-value arbitrage opportunity in aviation MRO.
meta.data_quality: Aggregated from public sources including IBA, Oliver Wyman, Aviation Week, ISTAT, OEM press releases, SEC filings, and industry publications

most_expensive_component_categories: High Pressure Turbine (HPT) blades and disks
Life Limited Parts (LLPs) - disks, seals, spools, shafts
cost_breakdown.key_insight: Parts dominate engine shop visit costs at 70-80%. Airfoils (blades and vanes) are 60-80% of replaceable parts. This is why USM and PMA parts create massive arbitrage opportunities.

cfm56_5b.green_time_engine_scarcity: High - lack of useful green time engines

aftermarket.market_driver: Extended 737NG/A320ceo operations due to LEAP/GTF delivery delays and GTF crisis

leap_1b.production_delays: Contributing to extended CFM56 fleet operations

maintenance_intervals.note: Early shop visits frustrating operators - intervals shorter than expected during maturation

v2500.manufacturer: International Aero Engines (Pratt & Whitney, JAEC, MTU, Fiat Avio)

crisis.root_cause: Contaminated powdered metal in manufacturing Q4 2015 - Q3 2021
crisis.affected_component: Stage 1 and Stage 2 disks in high-pressure turbine
crisis.upgrade_initiative_2026: Retrofit package with GTF Advantage durability features
crisis.resolution_timeline: Recovery expected through end of decade

arbitrage_implications: Massive demand for spare A320neo engines during crisis
Airlines with CFM56/V2500 A320ceos extending operations due to neo unavailability
Lease rates for all A320-family engines elevated
Parts for PW1100G HPT (disks especially) in extreme shortage
Compensation payments from P&W may exceed some airlines' operating margins
Creates cascading demand for CFM56 USM as A320ceos fly longer

maintenance_demand.demand_trend: Rising - expected to peak in 3-4 years
maintenance_demand.fleet_outlook: 767 CF6-80C2 fleet will be BIGGER in next decade than today

parts_supply.usm_availability: Limited - significant demand where no USM available
parts_supply.new_parts_availability: Also limited - factory new parts not available
parts_supply.key_insight: Aging fleet + cargo conversions = growing parts demand with shrinking supply. Prime arbitrage territory.

ftai_aviation.partner: AAR (exclusive Serviceable Engine Products agreement through 2030)
ftai_aviation.pma_strategy: Joint venture with Chromalloy for PMA parts
ftai_aviation.business_model: Vertical integration: acquire engines -> teardown -> module factory -> PMA parts -> sell/exchange
ftai_aviation.new_venture: FTAI Power - converting CFM56 engines to power turbines for AI data center demand

ga_telesis.role: Major USM provider and teardown operator
ga_telesis.certifications: FAA, EASA, CAAC, TCCA, DGCA, GACA, ANAC, ECAA
ga_telesis.recent_activity: Record number of CFM56-7B disassemblies in 2024

aerfin.facility: Expanded engine facility in South Wales, UK

kellstrom_aerospace.recent_activity: Disassembling CF6-80C2B1F and CFM56-5B engines simultaneously

willis_lease.leap_order: Up to 60 LEAP engines (~$900 million list price)

standardaero.leap_capability: LEAP-1A and LEAP-1B service including lease engines

most_valuable_teardown_parts: HPT blades ($5,000-$15,000 each, 60-80 per engine = $300K-$1.2M per set)
Life Limited Parts with remaining cycles
teardown_economics.value_vs_overhaul_insight: A teardown can yield $2-5M in USM from a CFM56, depending on part condition and remaining life on LLPs

rates.market_condition: Lessors' market - demand far exceeds supply across all types

tier_1_highest_value.rationale: 28,000 engines in service, 4,000 shop visits/year, HPT parts are 48%+ price increases, USM scarcity driving surge pricing
tier_1_highest_value.entry_strategy: Acquire run-out or time-expired CFM56-7B engines for teardown, harvest HPT section

tier_1_highest_value.opportunity: PW1100G HPT disks and turbine components
tier_1_highest_value.rationale: 600-700 engines need removal, 250-300 day inspection times, extreme parts shortage for contaminated powder metal components
tier_1_highest_value.entry_strategy: Source any available PW1100G serviceable HPT components
tier_1_highest_value.risk: Limited supply, OEM controls most parts

tier_1_highest_value.rationale: Growing fleet (767 cargo conversions), 220-260 annual shop visits trending up, no USM available, no new parts available = surge pricing
tier_1_highest_value.entry_strategy: Acquire retiring passenger 767/747 CF6-80C2 engines, teardown for cargo fleet demand

tier_2_strong_value.rationale: V2500 scarcity pushes demand to CFM56-5B, A320ceo operations extending
Fewer spares than CFM56, strong lease rates $70-80K/month
$20M+ per serviceable engine, $170-185K/month spot lease rates, limited MRO capacity
tier_2_strong_value.entry_strategy: Niche market - very high capital requirements but enormous per-unit value

tier_3_emerging.rationale: Frustrating early shop visits at 2,000-6,000 cycles creating unexpected parts demand
tier_3_emerging.entry_strategy: Position for growing aftermarket as LEAP fleet matures

tier_3_emerging.rationale: FTAI/Chromalloy JV targeting 50%+ margins, PMA parts approved as alternatives to OEM parts
tier_3_emerging.entry_strategy: Invest in PMA development or partner with PMA manufacturers

key_data_sources_for_ongoing_monitoring.faa_sdr_database: Service Difficulty Reports - tracks engine failures and parts issues
key_data_sources_for_ongoing_monitoring.faa_registry: Aircraft and engine registration - tracks fleet composition
key_data_sources_for_ongoing_monitoring.sec_filings: FTAI, StandardAero (SARO), RTX quarterly reports reveal market data
key_data_sources_for_ongoing_monitoring.iba_group: Engine values and lease rates (semi-annual updates)
key_data_sources_for_ongoing_monitoring.oliver_wyman: Annual Global Fleet & MRO Market Forecast
key_data_sources_for_ongoing_monitoring.aviation_week: MRO market intelligence and shop visit data
key_data_sources_for_ongoing_monitoring.aircraft_commerce: Detailed maintenance cost analysis by engine type
key_data_sources_for_ongoing_monitoring.avitrader: Real-time engine and parts trading activity
key_data_sources_for_ongoing_monitoring.ishka: Engine pricing and lease rate intelligence
